notes: Runs perfectly out of the box. No tweaks needed. I had a blackscreen on startup but could get around it by pressing ESC. Apart from that, nothing to complain about.
title: Rescue HQ - The Tycoon

notes: Black Screen when you start the game, just press esc and the menu comes up. Sound broke one time and got the low fps warning twice despite high fps, might as well just be a game issue.
title: Rescue HQ - The Tycoon

notes: There are some minor issues. The main menu gets unusable after using ALT+Tab to focus another window. Also, the already reported black screen that can be worked around by just clicking or pressing ESC. Once ingame, everything seems to be working fine.
title: Rescue HQ - The Tycoon

notes:
I have meanwhile tried the game on Windows, and sadly must report that there is one issue not mentioned up to now with Steam Play: In-Game videos do not work. The "black screen" at startup is actually the intro video. The main menu background, which is black with Steam Play, is actually a video file playing. When opening the "build" menu, the tutorial boxes are not missing text, they are missing videos.
So, yeah, the game is certainly playable, but some tutorial steps will not be properly shown...
title: Rescue HQ - The Tycoon

notes: The Game is NOT Platinum. Stop writing this bullshit. If there are any errors (like not playing videos) the game can't be platinum
title: Rescue HQ - The Tycoon

notes:
I've meanwhile tried to play the game with the WINE media foundation workaround installed ( https://github.com/z0z0z/mf-install - the game's wine prefix is  WINEPREFIX=~/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/809720/pfx ). 

This makes most of the game's videos play, but sadly some are still missing, for instance one of the videos in the building tutorial.
So, installing the media foundation workaround definitely improves the experience, but not enough to bring it to Gold.
title: Rescue HQ - The Tycoon
